name: otta
description: Otta — the self-learning AI software factory for Claude Code

plugins.name: otta
plugins.description: The self-learning AI software factory. Turns any Claude Code session into a TDD build → review → verify → ship pipeline run by specialist subagents, gated on acceptance criteria and schedulable as a cloud routine. Every gate verdict feeds the LEARN layer (GEPA) so the factory improves itself — plus DORA + idea→version metrics via the Otta Pulse GitHub App.
